title: parashorea dussaudii
intro: Parashorea dussaudii, also known as the Dussaud's parashorea, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Parashorea dussaudii include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, relieve pain, and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of Parashorea dussaudii are typically dried and used to make infusions or decoctions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
